title: StormFisher Hydrogen Secures US$50 million Commitment from Hy24 to Deliver Pipeline of Clean Fuel Production Projects in North America
content: StormFisher Hydrogen, a leading developer and producer of clean fuels, announces today it has secured a US$50 million commitment from Hy24â€™s Clean Hydrogen Infrastructure Fund, the worldâ€™s leading low-carbon hydrogen asset manager. This strategic partnership will accelerate StormFisher Hydrogenâ€™s pipeline of clean fuel production projects in North America, helping them to reach final investment decisions (FID) and catalyzing the transition to low carbon energy solutions.
author: Analysts Account
